AFIB_MEDICAID Atrial Fibrillation Indicator - Medicaid-Only Data NUM 1 This code specifies whether the enrollee met the chronic condition algorithm criteria, considering only Medicaid data, for having Atrial Fibrillation Values:
0 - Claims and FFS not met
1
